  • Join us!

  • A collection of our group moments is available here. 👉 [Read more]

  • [07/2026] Our group will attend the 25th International Conference on Solid State Ionics. We welcome opportunities to connect and discuss science! [link]

  • [06/2026] Our group will attend the Conference of Condensed Matter Physics. We welcome opportunities to connect and discuss science! [link]

  • [06/2026] Our group will attend the AI4X-AC Conference 2026. We welcome opportunities to connect and discuss science! [link]

  • [04/2026] We organized a symposium on “Atomistic and Generative Modeling for Materials Chemistry and Closed-Loop Design” at the 2026 MRS Spring Meeting. We welcome opportunities to connect and discuss science!

  • [03/2026] Dr. Zhong attended the ACS Spring 2026 meeting in Atlanta and gave an invited talk on generative modeling for solid-electrolyte interphases.

  • [12/2025] Yicheng Chen won the Best Poster Award at the NUS MSE MatterX Annual Congress! 🎉 👉 [Read more]

  • [11/2025] Dr. Zhong was awarded the AI2050 Early Career Fellowship by Schmidt Sciences. [Schmidt Sciences News] [NUS News] [BIDMaP News]

  • [07/2025] Dr. Zhong attended the AI4X Conference at the National University of Singapore from July 8 to July 11, 2025. He presented work on inpainting generation for crystal structure prediction. The AM3 Group opened its doors that day!

  • [06/2025] Dr. Zhong attended ICMAT 2025 in Singapore from June 30 to July 4, 2025. He presented an invited talk on atomistic and generative modeling for battery materials. [link]

  • [04/2025] Dr. Zhong attended ICLR 2025 in Singapore from April 26 to 28, 2025, and gave a workshop presentation on agentic AI for scientific discovery. [link]

  • [04/2025] Dr. Zhong attended the Molecular Dynamics for Materials Science Workshop from April 7 to 11, 2025, at the Lorentz Center in Leiden, Netherlands. [link]

  • [03/2025] We successfully organized the symposium on Generative Modeling for Chemistry, Biology, and Materials Discovery at the ACS Spring 2025 meeting. [link] (Featured by Nature Computational Science)

  • [01/2025] Dr. Zhong attended the Global Young Scientists Summit held at the National University of Singapore from January 6 to 11, 2025. [link]

  • [10/2024] Dr. Zhong received the NUS Presidential Young Professorship. The AM3 Group was scheduled to start in summer 2025.


The AM3 Group - DMSE@NUS
